title: Tummy Time Mat, Inflatable Tummy Time Water Mat, Newborn Toys Play Mat Baby Playmat Sensory Toy, Baby Water Play Mat for Infants and Toddlers 3 Months and Above…
features: 🎁【Premium Baby Water Mat】This tummy time baby water mat is made of durable, 100% BPA-free and non-toxic heavy-duty PVC material, fully tested, comfortable and soft, inflatable, leak-proof, don't worry about it Floors may get wet. And it has a long lifespan to support your child.

🎁【Easy to Set Up and Carry】The size of the inflatable mat is 26.6" * 20" * 2.8", providing a spacious play area for your little one, and it is lightweight and can be taken anywhere. Just fill the edge of the baby air mat on the central play mat with water, winter It can be filled with warm water, so that the baby will not feel cold when lying on the tummy, for best results, please fill it with 80% water. After use, just drain the air and water.

🎁【Promote Baby Development】The water-filled play mat is an important tool for exercising head, neck and shoulder muscles, as well as exercising hand-eye coordination, fine motor and social skills. Lays the foundation for baby to reach motor milestones, including rolling, sitting, crawling and more; Helps develop baby's sense of touch; Helps develop hand-eye coordination.

🎁【Interactive Tummy Time Mat】The baby play mat is designed with the theme of the sea world, and the colorful sea-themed baby activity mat has patterns and models of sea animals, which can make your baby feel like entering the underwater world. With cute floating toys inside, the sound of splashing will help your baby learn to play and interact with their surroundings, making tummy time easier and happier for your baby.

🎁【Perfect Gift for Babies】This baby inflatable water mat is suitable for newborns of 3 months and above, the tummy time water mat can not only exercise the baby's sensory ability, but also reduce the burden of novice parents to take care of their children, it is a perfect gift for babies Great birthday gift, baby shower gift, and stocking stuffer. Note: Due to new production and packaging, it is normal to have PVC smell, just put it in the vent for two or three days to eliminate the smell.
description: Product Description Aolso Baby Water Mat The baby water mat is made of BPA-free PVC, comfortable and soft, very safe for your baby. The baby play mat is designed with a marine world theme, featuring colorful sea creature patterns, so your baby can feel immersed in the underwater world. The water-filled play mat is a great tool for exercising head, neck and shoulder muscles, developing hand-eye coordination, fine motor skills and social skills. It can be used both indoors and outdoors. It's the perfect gift for newborns as a baby shower, birthday present, Christmas present and more. Tummy Time Water Mat The underwater swimming animals will catch baby's attention as they dance their arms and legs across the water mat and pretend to swim in the sea. You can fill the mat with warm or cold water to allow your baby to enjoy tummy time. Baby Activity Play Mat Place this inflatable water mat on the ground, lawn or anywhere you want your baby to enjoy hours of tummy time play. This fun and entertaining play toy will provide hours of entertaining parent-child interaction. Early baby development The baby play mat can promote the baby's motor development, can help the baby strengthen the crawling muscles of the neck, legs and arms, and can also improve the baby's hand-eye coordination.
